Nice.name: Dahan River Bikeway (Yingge section)
Nice.notes: Flat riverside trail, well-shaded, easy parking at Yingge end

Nice.name: Jiaoban Mountain Trail (Sanxia)
Nice.notes: Short loop ~2.5km, good views of Sanxia valley; use trekking poles

Nice.name: Bitan Scenic Area (Xindian)
Nice.notes: Suspension bridge, shaded banks, gentle terrain

Nice.name: Banqiao 435 Art Zone Garden
Nice.notes: Sculpture garden, flat, benches frequent; accessible toilets

Nice.name: Tucheng Chenfu Road Riverside Park
Nice.notes: 10-min drive from Shulin, very flat, often breezy

Nice.name: Longmen Camping Meadow (Sanxia)
Nice.notes: Open meadow by Sanxia River, beautiful on clear days; uneven ground

Warm.name: Shulin Riverside Greenway
Warm.notes: Local favourite ??5km flat loop, shaded sections, water stations

Warm.name: Yingge Ceramics Museum Park
Warm.notes: Outdoor sculpture garden, paved paths, interesting for all ages

Warm.name: Sanxia Old Street & Zushi Temple
Warm.notes: Best in morning before crowds; cobblestones can be tricky ??bring a cane

Warm.name: Zhonghe Yuantong Mountain Trail
Warm.notes: Shaded climb ~3km, cooler than valley floor, good workout

Warm.name: Banqiao Lin Family Garden
Warm.notes: Historic garden, very flat, shaded by large banyan trees

Warm.name: Tamsui Old Street & Waterfront
Warm.notes: Worth the 50km drive ??waterfront promenade, sunset views

Cloudy & Breezy.name: Banqiao Station Underground Mall Walk
Cloudy & Breezy.notes: Covered, climate-controlled, no wind; good fallback on breezy days

Cloudy & Breezy.name: Sanxia Dasi Bikeway (lower section)
Cloudy & Breezy.notes: Flat, riverside section sheltered by tree line; wind-protected

Cloudy & Breezy.name: Tucheng Sports Center Indoor Track
Cloudy & Breezy.notes: Fully covered 200m indoor track, climate-controlled, very accessible

Cloudy & Breezy.name: Xinzhuang Lihui Park
Cloudy & Breezy.notes: Large sheltered pavilions, community tai chi groups in morning

Cloudy & Breezy.name: Shulin Community Center Courtyard
Cloudy & Breezy.notes: Covered walkway, easy access, good for overcast days

Stay In.name: Banqiao Far Eastern Department Store Sky Garden
Stay In.notes: Rooftop garden accessible by elevator; protected terrace on drizzly days

Stay In.name: Fuzhong Library Garden (Banciao)
Stay In.notes: Quiet library garden courtyard, sheltered veranda, good AQI days only

Stay In.name: Sanxia Visitor Center & Museum
Stay In.notes: Fully indoor, free entry, interesting local history exhibits
